cases.name: brainstorm-explicit
cases.prompt: /omc-brainstorm 给我 3 个 onboarding 方向

cases.name: spec-explicit
cases.prompt: /omc-spec write acceptance criteria and constraints for this feature

cases.name: plan-auto-cn
cases.prompt: 帮我规划一下这个需求怎么做

cases.name: plan-explicit-en
cases.prompt: /omc-plan break this feature into milestones and risks

cases.name: debug-auto-cn
cases.prompt: 帮我排查这个问题为什么不生效

cases.name: review-auto-cn
cases.prompt: 帮我 review 当前改动有没有问题

cases.name: develop-explicit
cases.prompt: /omc-develop implement this feature end to end

cases.name: check-explicit
cases.prompt: /omc-verify prove this works and identify coverage gaps

cases.name: learn-explicit
cases.prompt: /omc-learn capture the lesson from this regression

cases.name: generic-analyze-does-not-hijack
cases.prompt: analyze this helper and explain what it does

cases.name: generic-check-does-not-force-review
cases.prompt: 帮我检查一下这个接口文档怎么写

cases.name: generic-error-does-not-force-debug
cases.prompt: 这个错误提示文案改一下

cases.name: stepwise-request-does-not-map-to-develop
cases.prompt: 一步一步带我改这个页面
